reasoning: Arithmetic intensity is very low (0.03 FLOP/byte), but DRAM bandwidth utilization is only 0.2% of peak, so this is not bandwidth-limited memory-bound behavior. The kernel shows 98.9% long scoreboard stalls with 99.3% occupancy and only 16 registers/thread, indicating warps are mostly waiting on dependent load latency rather than lacking occupancy; the pointer-chasing pattern `idx = next_idx[idx]` creates a serialized dependency chain each iteration.
raw_response:

CONFIDENCE: HIGH
REASONING: Arithmetic intensity is very low (0.03 FLOP/byte), but DRAM bandwidth utilization is only 0.2% of peak, so this is not bandwidth-limited memory-bound behavior. The kernel shows 98.9% long scoreboard stalls with 99.3% occupancy and only 16 registers/thread, indicating warps are mostly waiting on dependent load latency rather than lacking occupancy; the pointer-chasing pattern `idx = next_idx[idx]` creates a serialized dependency chain each iteration.
